across.clue: Fortune means the things that happen but are not controlled by a person.
Guidance is help and advice that is given to someone about their work, education, or personal life.
To refer to something means to mention or call attention to it.
To destroy means to damage something so badly that it cannot be used.
Jeopardy is danger of loss or harm.
If something is endangered, it has become very rare and may eventually die out altogether.
To intend to do something means to plan to do it.
To deter means to prevent or discourage someone from doing something.
The Internet is a global computer network.
An applicant is someone who writes a request to be considered for a job or prize.
An envelope is a flat paper container for a letter.
An artery is a tube that takes blood from the heart to the rest of the body.

down.clue: To magnify something means to make it look bigger than it really is.
To overcome a problem is to successfully fix it.
Evident means easy to see or understand.
A report is something someone writes for school or work.
a small book that gives information about a subject or instructions about how to use something.
If something is memorable, then it is remembered for a special reason.
Downstairs means on a lower floor of a building.
someone or something that has the same size value importance or meaning as someone or something else
